articles.title: PRODUCT ANALYTICS ONLY TELLS HALF THE STORY
articles.summary: Behavioral analytics captures the _what_ but rarely the _why_.

articles.title: Curious? Read the whitepaper (free and ungated)
WHY RETENTION IS SO HARD FOR NEW TECH PRODUCTS
articles.summary: Early retention determines long-term success. Churn is nearly irreversible, and viral growth without stickiness fails. Great retention requires timing, strong category choice, and a product that feels magical.

articles.title: DO YOU NEED A GTM ENGINEER?
articles.summary: GTM engineering is trendy in 2025, but jobs are still rare compared to other go-to-market roles. Companies are testing it through agencies, internal reskilling, or RevOps teams rather than making direct hires.

articles.title: THE ORCHESTRATION CHALLENGE FOR PRODUCT MANAGERS
articles.summary: AI speeds up product work, but complexity still creates risk in handoffs. Product managers now thrive by mastering orchestration - mapping dependencies, creating lightweight rituals, and surfacing risks early to connect strategy with delivery.

articles.title: AI WILL SUPERCHARGE MODELBUSTERS
articles.summary: AI is rapidly expanding into trillion-dollar markets, powered by exponential cost declines and breakthrough capabilities. Startups are scaling faster than past tech cycles, with new pricing models set to disrupt incumbents and capture outsized value.

articles.title: BUILD AI AGENTS USERS ACTUALLY TRUST: FREE WORKSHOP
articles.summary: For PMs building production-ready AI agents who need to move beyond high accuracy to high adoption. Join us live to learn architectural patterns that create magical user experiences, not just smart responses. Deep dive into actual implementation using battle-tested open source tools like Strands while leveraging production services from AWS.

articles.title: GROWTH TEAM OF ONE: HOW TO WEAR MULTIPLE HATS WITHOUT LOSING YOUR MIND
articles.summary: A “Growth Team of One” thrives by wearing multiple hats - executing, analyzing, researching, and prioritizing with speed. Aligning around user value, trust, and shared quality turns hybrid operators into powerful growth drivers.

articles.title: IS YOUR STARTUP IDEA ANY GOOD? BORROW THESE VALIDATION TACTICS
articles.summary: Startup founders validate ideas in unconventional ways, from testing risky assumptions with quick experiments to pitching raw concepts to strangers or leaning on fellow founders. The key is to gather honest signals that build conviction before investing years into building.

articles.title: TENDER LEADERSHIP WITH A BIT OF MISCHIEF
articles.summary: Great leadership blends structure with tenderness - hiring for difference, fostering rhythm, and acting with care. By valuing individuality and trust, teams grow stronger, more resilient, and deliver lasting impact together.

articles.title: YOU'RE DEFINITELY GOING TO BE A MANAGER NOW
articles.summary: AI is reshaping management by reducing middle roles, blurring IC and manager boundaries, and requiring clearer purpose-setting. While AI eases execution, leaders must balance stability and adaptability to guide anxious teams through change.

articles.title: FROM ANALYSIS TO WISDOM
articles.summary: Overanalyzing life through broad patterns can blind people to their individuality.
